name: Long-Term Sequential Decision Making under Risk
summary: arXiv:2607.19914v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study finite-horizon MDP planning under \emph{root-based} (resolute) risk objectives that apply a rank-dependent functional to the distribution of...
description: arXiv:2607.19914v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study finite-horizon MDP planning under \emph{root-based} (resolute) risk objectives that apply a rank-dependent functional to the distribution of total returns. Such objectives are non-linear in the return distribution and generally break Bellman optimality, so direct optimization by scenario-tree enumeration is intractable. We propose \textbf...
author: Irmaan (Mohammad),  Mirzanejad, Nadjet Bourdache, Abdel-Illah Mouaddib
